response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with genuine developer-tooling passion and even direct IDE development experience (NI LabWindows/CVI), but the role's core requirements are strong Java and Kotlin expertise with deep JVM understanding and solid Spring ecosystem experience — none of which are evidenced. His recent decade centers on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang; Java appears only peripherally and Kotlin and Spring not at all, making him a poor match for an enterprise JVM tooling role despite the tooling affinity.
strengths: Hands-on IDE internals experience building components for NI LabWindows/CVI (a C IDE used by engineers worldwide)
Deep developer-tooling instincts: authored test runners (Trial), assertion libraries (Fluent-Asserts), and MCP code generators
Long, varied senior/staff track record across web, embedded, low-latency, and large-scale systems
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin or Spring ecosystem experience, both required qualifications
Java exposure is minimal and dated (side projects at Altom circa 2016-2018); no evidence of deep JVM expertise
Recent work (TypeScript/Node, DLang) is far from enterprise Java frameworks, build tools, and application servers
